# Laura Pace

Laura Pace is Acme Corp's General Counsel and a cautious voice on the engagement. Her concern is disclosure liability: once the company publishes a baseline, it is on the hook for the numbers and for any forward-looking commitments attached to them. She is a gatekeeper on the language that reaches the board and any public report.

Laura sits outside the operational reporting line but influences COO Reema Sharma directly on what Acme is willing to commit to in writing. She is not opposed to the baseline itself — she wants the methodology defensible and the claims conservative, and she will slow things down to get there.
